data.title: Angry Crab Shack hosts Mardi Gras fest in Chandler with live music and Cajun food, benefits Boulder Crest Foundation.
data.description: A lively event suitable for families will showcase live music and delicious Cajun dishes, with some of the profits going towards the Boulder Crest Foundation. Set to take place in Mesa, Arizona on January 29, 2026, the popular Angry Crab Shack restaurant known for its flavorful Asian-Cajun seafood boils will be hosting the festivities.

data.title: FlexScreen and RiteScreen merge to form under one brand, marking a milestone in window and door industry.
data.description: In Hialeah, Florida and Pittsburgh, a major announcement was made on January 29, 2026, as FlexScreen and RiteScreen revealed the official launch of their merged brand. This marks a significant event in the window and door industry. The combined entity, known as FlexScreen / RiteScreen, signifies a noteworthy consolidation within the field.

data.title: Hedera (HBAR) aims for $0.16 by month-end, indicating 60% potential upside. Current RSI at 35 raises caution for investors.
data.description: The price prediction for HBAR indicates a possible 60% increase to reach $0.16 by the end of January. However, investors in Hedera should exercise caution due to the ongoing bearish momentum and the Relative Strength Index (RSI) currently standing at 35.

data.title: Calian to discuss Q1 FY 2026 results in conference call at 8:30 am ET on Feb 12, 2026.
data.description: Calian® Group Ltd. has scheduled a conference call for 8:30 a.m. EST on Thursday, February 12, 2026. The call will focus on the results for the first quarter of fiscal year 2026.

data.title: Dove partners with Bridgerton for a limited-edition collection in Canada, inspired by the show. Two scents available.
data.description: The renowned Beauty and Personal Care brand, Dove, has collaborated with the hit show Bridgerton, produced by Netflix and Shondaland, to launch an exclusive collection in anticipation of the upcoming Season 4 debut on Netflix. The Dove x Bridgerton Limited-Edition Collection is currently accessible in Canada, offering consumers a chance to elevate their daily routines with two captivating fragrances, enriching ingredients, and custom packaging reflecting the elegance, intrigue, and luxury of the Ton. This partnership aims to provide a royal experience to customers, emphasizing the fusion of Dove's quality with Bridgerton's allure.

data.title: Nonprofit PH4U announces 2026 Stand for Life Gala on March 27 with guest speaker Kirk Cameron at Hurst Conference Center.
data.description: A nonprofit organization called Pregnancy Help 4 U (PH4U) in North Texas has revealed details about their upcoming 2026 Stand for Life Gala. This event is aimed at advocating for life preservation and supporting families. Scheduled for Friday, March 27, 2026, the gala will be held at the Hurst Conference Center.

data.title: Arasan unveils xSPI NOR + eMMC NAND Combo PHY IP, integrating seamlessly with xSPI + eMMC Combo Controller IP.
data.description: Arasan Chip Systems, a prominent semiconductor IP provider for mobile and automobile SoCs, has introduced a new xSPI NOR and eMMC NAND Combo PHY IP. This technology seamlessly integrates with their existing xSPI + eMMC Combo Controller IP. The announcement was made in San Jose, California, on Jan. 29, 2026. This advancement signifies Arasan's commitment to enhancing their product offerings and catering to diverse market demands.

data.title: Safety Harbor Resort and Spa in Florida celebrates 100th anniversary; owner William Touloumis turns 90.
data.description: In Safety Harbor, Florida, the renowned Safety Harbor Resort and Spa is set to commemorate a significant 100-year milestone this year as one of the state's most legendary attractions. Concurrently, the establishment will also be celebrating a noteworthy personal achievement - the 90th birthday of a key figure involved.

data.title: LDO price could reach $0.75-$0.85 in February, now at $0.48 with RSI 31.54. Analysts predict 45-67% upside.
data.description: The current market price of Lido DAO (LDO) is $0.48, with the relative strength index (RSI) indicating oversold conditions at 31.54. Analysts predict a potential increase of 45-67% for LDO, with a projected target range of $0.75-$0.85 by early February 2026 based on technical indicators.

data.title: Grant Thornton appoints Craig Woodfield as national managing partner of Assurance Quality and Risk, succeeding Jeff Hughes.
data.description: Chicago-based audit and assurance firm Grant Thornton LLP in the U.S. has appointed Craig Woodfield as the new national managing partner of Assurance Quality and Risk. Woodfield will now lead all quality control and risk operations for the company's Audit & Assurance division. He takes over from Jeff Hughes, who is set to retire in June 2026 following a remarkable 40-year tenure. Ron Messenger, from Grant Thornton, emphasized the critical role of quality in the organization's operations.
